evidence: first_action_clarity 9.0: every first viewport shows task + mode label + stage kicker + exactly one orange primary CTA without scroll — next-task-375x844.png (ЗАДАЧА 2 · Проверка переноса, single CTA 'Позвать взрослого'), photo/task-375x844.png ('Сначала реши задачу целиком', CTA 'Сфотографировать решение'), typed-incorrect-390x844.png ('Проверь вычисления', CTA 'Проверить ответ'). Exactly one .workbook-primary-action per state (LearningWorkspace.tsx:1181-1206); mode-switch and secondary actions are visually subordinate.

journey_continuity 9.0: single-surface workspace, no route/page change across condition/answer/feedback/tutor. Incorrect typed keeps same task + preserved draft (typed-summary.json incorrect.preserved_answer '0', verdict incorrect, same problem_id 1766); correct typed advances to next task with success live-region (typed-summary.json correct.advanced_without_photo true → transfer_task 332). Tutor is an overlay; statement stays pinned; Escape closes and restores focus+scroll (public-photo-cjm-summary.json tutor.escape_closed true, focus_restored 'tutor-trigger', scroll_restored [0,0]). Draft persistence via typedDraftsRef/guidedDraftsRef Maps + 409 stale-draft recovery UI (LearningWorkspace.tsx:179-181,438,627-639). Directly closes owner complaint 'постоянно кидает из одной страницы в другую'.

math_focus 8.5: statement rendered via MathText/KaTeX at --workspace-statement clamp up to 1.75rem, katex 1.04em (LearningWorkspace.css:145-154, tokens.css:117); desktop two-zone puts the large math column left and a compact composer right (next-task-1280x900.png, feedback-932x430.png). Brand is a small mark, progress a small pill, no heavy AI chrome, decoration limited to paper gradient + thin lines. Held at 8.5 (not 9) because the largest text element is the Russian instruction H1 label ('Реши самостоятельно'), with the actual problem text slightly smaller beneath it — math is dominant over brand/progress/chrome but not the single biggest glyph.

guided_instruction 8.5: guided contract renders prompt as H2 title + instruction + a boxed 'Что написать' format hint + 'Например: <example>' + mastery note that explicitly states the разбор does NOT confirm level ('Уровень подтвердит следующая самостоятельная задача') — LearningWorkspace.tsx:855-876. This addresses brief problem-evidence #1 (labeled field with no format) and the 'guided increases mastery' critical cap. Backend AI-grounded verdict with schema/echo/confidence/idempotency gate per EVIDENCE-SNAPSHOT/BRIEF. Capped at 8.5: no guided_step screenshot or geometry in the r4 artifact set, so rendered contract quality, the example's foreign-numbers rule, and 375px overflow on this state are assessed from code only.

tutor_usefulness 9.0: real-AI replies are grounded, contextual, non-canned and do NOT reveal the answer — Chromium 'Сначала нужно узнать, сколько именно граммов соли было в исходном растворе. Как ты вычислишь массу соли в 300 граммах 25-процентного раствора?' (public-photo-cjm-summary.json tutor.reply); WebKit gives a different context-specific guiding question 'Как найти 25 процентов от 300 граммов?'. Tutor sees statement+content_idx+step (LearningWorkspace.tsx:510-535); sheet pins the statement as context and the empty state guides the child to ask about a specific spot (LearningWorkspace.tsx:1268-1275). Directly closes owner complaint 'AI не отвечает ничего кроме дай следующий шаг' and acceptance scenario 3.

mobile_comfort 8.5: horizontal_overflow 0 across all 14 geometries in Chromium + WebKit; console/page/request/http errors empty (typed-summary.json + public-photo-cjm-summary.json, both browsers). Targets ≥44px (--workspace-hit 2.75rem; measured primary/mode_switch/field 44-57px). Composer is position:static on mobile and landscape — no fixed-dock trap (LearningWorkspace.css:872-875,1139-1142). Short-landscape fix verified: CTA within first screen at 844×375 (primary y=247 h=44 → 291<375) and 932×430 (feedback-932x430.png, typed-incorrect-844x375.png). Held at 8.5: on narrow mobile (≤~430px) the fixed 'Сменить ученика' exit button (AppShell.tsx:20-32, z-60, min 44×44, label hidden below sm) overlaps the in-header status pill .workbook-session__progress and clips 'Задача N' to 'Зад…' — visible in next-task-375x844.png, typed-incorrect-390x844.png, photo/task-375x844.png, real-heic.png. P2 cosmetic collision (both 44px, exit fully tappable, pill is non-interactive, no overflow) — not the critical 'obscured input/focus'.

accessibility_resilience 8.5: semantic landmarks + aria-labelledby linking task and stage titles (LearningWorkspace.tsx:593-615); labelled inputs; explicit visible focus outline + input focus ring (LearningWorkspace.css:347-351,824-828); tutor focus trap + Escape + focus restore + body scroll lock + role=dialog aria-modal (LearningWorkspace.tsx:333-395,701-718); aria-live polite/atomic live region for pending/success + role=alert errors (LearningWorkspace.tsx:720-725,928); prefers-reduced-motion disables pulse/backdrop/sheet/transition (LearningWorkspace.css:1285-1295); Cyrillic + KaTeX render clean; loading/recovery(provider_error role=alert)/incorrect/unsure/correct/stale states all present. Nit (P2): tutor trigger has hardcoded aria-expanded='false' regardless of open state (LearningWorkspace.tsx:1172) — impact small under the modal/focus-move pattern. Also guided/tutor surfaces not screenshotted, so a11y there is code-verified.

premium_distinctiveness 8.5: genuinely new two-zone 'рабочая тетрадь' editorial system (warm paper radial gradient, forest ink, single disciplined orange action with pressed-shadow, thin notebook lines, custom BrandMark, KaTeX) — not a token/radius reskin of the old three-zone 'Фокус-станция' DOM, no card soup, no mascot, no fake progress (mastery shows real self-solved evidence 1/3 in feedback-375x844.png, not a decorative bar). Held at 8.5 by two P2 polish blemishes: the mobile header pill/exit collision above, and the EvidenceStrip green CheckIcon + '<answer> · ответ проверен' shown next to an INCORRECT typed answer (LearningWorkspace.tsx:756-757, typed-incorrect-390x844.png) which can momentarily read as success though the dominant feedback block 'Проверь вычисления и попробуй ещё раз' is unambiguous.

photo invariants PASS: real reported HEIC of a non-matching task → same-surface photo_recovery 'На фото не видно решения этой задачи' (not 'неверно'), attempt preserved, 'Замени снимок без штрафа за решение' — real-heic.png + public-photo-cjm-summary.json heic.reason wrong_photo; the same HEIC on its matching task → AI verdict correct (matching-heic-summary.json verdict correct, 7.035s). Correct typed completes without photo (typed-summary.json correct.advanced_without_photo true).

mechanical corroboration: backend 696 passed vs isolated Postgres; frontend ESLint/design-lint/tsc/vitest clean; git diff --check clean; r3→r4 delta is CSS-only + harness 390-width per EVIDENCE-SNAPSHOT.md. Byte-parity of image assets vs working tree confirmed (CANDIDATE-SHA256SUMS).
